LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. THE CLAIMS IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT DO NOT ARISE FROM THE WRITTEN CONTRACT CONTAINING THE ARBITRATION PROVISION. RATHER, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANT BREACHED A SUBSEQUENT ORAL CONTRACT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.(302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Mar-10-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN's Motion To Compel Arbitration is denied. The claims in the First Amended Complaint do not arise from the written contract containing the arbitration provision. Rather, Plaintiff alleges that Defendant breached a subsequent oral contract. (Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - DON WERNO, TEL. NO. (714)542-4466, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. LOC PHAM, TEL. NO. (310) 266-8746 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

* * * After hearing, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT EVAN BAILYN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. * * * * *
